description:
## Background

The first Child Issues slice establishes the hierarchy section but deliberately preserves loaded order and always displays its empty state. Issue Detail should ultimately match Beadwork's child ordering convention and avoid spending detail space on a hierarchy section that has no content.

Triage: ready-for-agent

## What to build

Refine the existing Child Issues section so entries are ordered by priority from P0 through P4, then by creation date oldest first. When the selected Issue has no Child Issues, omit the entire Child Issues section rather than rendering its prior empty state.

## Technical Approach

- Build on the Child Issue derivation established by bsm-x6s.
- Sort a derived collection without mutating the explorer's loaded `allIssues` data.
- Use Beadwork-compatible ordering: ascending numeric priority, then ascending creation timestamp.
- Render the section conditionally only when the sorted Child Issue collection is non-empty.

## Considerations

- Keep derivation local to presentation state; do not add a durable Beadsmith hierarchy model or make a new CLI call.
- Preserve the required Child Issue entry content and section position after Dependencies.
- Define deterministic handling in tests for ties and dates as represented by the existing Issue contract.
- This task does not make entries navigable; that remains separate work.

## Acceptance criteria

- [ ] Child Issues are ordered P0 through P4, then oldest to newest by creation date.
- [ ] Sorting does not reorder `allIssues` or the Issue List.
- [ ] Issue Detail omits the Child Issues heading and content when no Child Issues exist.
- [ ] Existing populated Child Issues rendering remains available after Dependencies.
- [ ] Focused tests cover priority ordering, creation-date tie breaking, and absent-section behavior.

## Test Plan

- Add/update pure derivation tests for ordering without input mutation.
- Extend Issue Explorer component tests for conditional visibility.
- Run the affected frontend test suite and Ultracite checks.
title: Polish Child Issue ordering and empty-state visibility
